scripts.aw: sh -c 'if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec bun packages/agent-worker/src/cli/index.ts "$@"; else exec node --import tsx packages/agent-worker/src/cli/index.ts "$@"; fi' --
scripts.typecheck: tsgo --build --pretty tsconfig.build.json && tsgo -p internals/shared/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p internals/loop/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p internals/agent/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p internals/harness/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/agent-worker/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p internals/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: bun test internals/shared/src/event-bus.test.ts internals/loop/test internals/agent/test internals/harness/test packages/agent-worker/test
